_comment: Story 2.4 Stryker mutation config (SEC-6, DoD-9). Run from packages/editorial: npx stryker run. Targets the editorial log repository + contract types. Threshold >=90% score. Mutation targets TC-3.1..TC-3.15 are killed by tests/integration/editorial-log.integration.test.ts (35) + tests/contract/editorial-boundary.contract.test.ts (10) + tests/perf/editorial-log.perf.test.ts (3) + tests/chaos/editorial-log.chaos.test.ts (3).
_concurrency_note: concurrency:1 — parallelism masks mutants under concurrent writers (DoD-9)
